description: Common error patterns in Turbo pipeline logs and their solutions

patterns.description: Database credentials in secret are incorrect
solutions: Verify credentials work: psql 'postgresql://user:pass@host/db'
Update secret: goldsky secret update SECRET_NAME --value '...'
Check username spelling in secret JSON
Verify database is running
Check host and port in secret are correct
Whitelist Goldsky IP ranges in firewall
Enable remote connections in database config

patterns.description: Pipeline references a secret that doesn't exist
causes: Secret name is misspelled in YAML
solutions: List secrets: goldsky secret list
Create secret: goldsky secret create --name NAME --value '...'
Check secret_name spelling in pipeline YAML

patterns.description: Database storage quota exceeded (common with Neon free tier)
causes: Neon free tier is limited to 512MB
solutions: Upgrade Neon plan
Use a different database provider
Clear existing data from tables
Add filtering to reduce data volume

patterns.description: Database requires SSL but connection isn't using it
solutions: Most managed databases (Neon, Supabase) handle SSL automatically
For self-hosted, configure SSL in database settings

patterns.description: Pipeline references a dataset that doesn't exist
causes: Dataset not available for that chain
solutions: Check chain prefix: matic (not polygon), ethereum (not eth)
Use raw_transactions not transactions
Validate YAML: goldsky turbo validate pipeline.yaml
Validate YAML first: goldsky turbo validate pipeline.yaml
Test SQL syntax in a SQL client
Check column names match source schema
Use lowercase for WHERE comparisons

patterns.description: Duplicate values in primary key column
solutions: Ensure primary_key column has unique values
Add DISTINCT to SQL query
Use a different primary_key column
Verify bootstrap servers are correct
Check security protocol (SASL_SSL, PLAINTEXT, etc.)
Verify Kafka credentials

causes: Resource size too small for data volume
solutions: Increase resource_size: s -> m -> l
Add filtering to reduce data volume
Break into multiple pipelines

patterns.description: Pipeline processing slower than data arrival rate
solutions: Increase resource_size
Optimize database (add indexes)
Simplify transforms
Consider multiple sinks for load distribution

patterns.description: Pipeline checkpoint was reset, reprocessing from start
patterns.note: This may be intentional if you wanted to reprocess data

patterns.pattern: WASM execution failed|script transform error|transform is not a function
patterns.description: TypeScript/WASM script transform failed during execution
causes: Runtime error in TypeScript code (null access, type error)
Return value doesn't match declared schema
Script uses unsupported APIs (no network, no imports)
solutions: Check script defines function transform(input) { ... }
Add null checks for input fields: input.field ?? ''
Ensure returned object has all fields from schema
Remove any require/import statements (sandboxed environment)
Simplify script and add logic incrementally to isolate issue

patterns.description: Dynamic table transform failed to connect or query backend
causes: Backing table doesn't exist in database
Secret for dynamic table backend is invalid
Column names don't match between config and actual table
solutions: Verify secret exists: goldsky secret list
Check backing table exists in your database
Verify column names match between YAML and database table
Test database connectivity outside Goldsky

patterns.description: External HTTP handler transform timed out or failed
causes: Handler endpoint is slow or unresponsive
Network issue between Goldsky and handler
solutions: Increase timeout_ms in handler config
Verify handler URL is reachable
Check handler returns JSON array of same length as input
Reduce batch_size to send fewer records per request

patterns.description: Cannot redeploy a job-mode pipeline without deleting first
causes: Job-mode pipelines cannot be updated in place
Previous job run hasn't been cleaned up yet
solutions: Delete the existing job: goldsky turbo delete <name>
Then redeploy: goldsky turbo apply <file.yaml>
Wait for auto-cleanup (~1 hour after job completion)

healthyIndicators.meaning: Data is being written to sink
